content: The iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine can be reframed as a foundational 'feedback backbone' that can be enhanced by multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve edge cases where single-perspective self-feedback fails to catch blind spots. This combination creates a two-layer self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while eliminating its weakness of getting stuck in local optima from homogeneous feedback.
